characteristics.coat_type: Double coat, harsh outer, soft under

description.overview: The Shikoku is a rare Japanese hunting dog from the mountains of Shikoku island, used to hunt wild boar.
description.temperament: Shikoku are loyal, alert, and cautious with strangers. They're brave hunters and devoted companions.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to hip dysplasia and allergies.
description.exercise: High energy. Need vigorous daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Rare Japanese hunting dogs with wolf-like appearance. Shikoku are loyal and agile but need experienced owners and plenty of exercise.
